info.title: ScriptBee Gateway API
info.description: API for ScriptBee Gateway service, managing projects, plugins, and analysis.

post.description: Creates a new project with the specified name and description.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all existing projects with their basic details.

delete.description: Deletes a project and all its associated data, including scripts and artifacts.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific project by its unique identifier.

post.description: Creates a new script within the specified project.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all scripts available in the specified project.

delete.description: Deletes a file or directory (node) from the project structure.

get.description: Retrieves metadata about a specific project script.

patch.description: Updates the metadata (name, parameters) of a specific project script.

get.description: Retrieves the actual code content of a project script.

put.description: Updates the actual code content of a specific project script.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of files and directories within the specified project.
Retrieves a list of all script languages and types supported by the project.
Retrieves a list of all available plugins from the marketplace.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific plugin from the marketplace by its unique identifier.

get.summary: Get installed plugins for a project
get.description: Retrieves a list of all plugins currently installed in the specified project.

post.description: Uploads a plugin ZIP file and installs it into the project.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific plugin installed in a project.

put.description: Installs a specific version of a plugin from the marketplace into the project.

delete.summary: Uninstall a plugin from a project
delete.description: Uninstalls a specific plugin version from the specified project.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all plugins installed at the gateway level.

post.description: Installs a new plugin at the gateway level.

delete.description: Uninstalls a plugin from the gateway level.

put.description: Uploads one or more files to be used by a specific loader in the project.

post.description: Allocates and adds a new execution instance for the specified project.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all instances associated with the specified project.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific project instance.

delete.description: Deallocates and removes a specific project instance.

get.summary: Get available linkers for an instance
get.description: Retrieves a list of all linkers available for the specified project instance.

get.summary: Get available loaders for an instance
get.description: Retrieves a list of all loaders available for the specified project instance.
Retrieves the current data context for the specified project instance.

post.description: Clears all loaded data from the current context of the specified project instance.
Generates script classes based on the current data context for the specified project instance and returns them as a stream.
Links the data context of the specified project instance using the provided linkers.
Loads data into the context of the specified project instance using the provided loaders.
Reloads the data context for the specified project instance, refreshing all linked and loaded data.

get.description: Downloads a specific file generated as a result of an analysis.
Downloads a ZIP archive containing all files generated as a result of an analysis.
Retrieves the console output generated during the analysis.
Retrieves a list of errors that occurred during the analysis execution.
Retrieves a list of files generated as a result of the analysis.
Retrieves the actual code content of a script used in a specific analysis.
Retrieves metadata about a script used in a specific analysis, such as its name and type.

get.summary: Get all analyses for a project
get.description: Retrieves a list of all analyses performed within the specified project.
Retrieves the current status and details of a specific analysis.

post.description: Triggers a new analysis for a specific project instance using a given script.

CreateProjectCommand.description: Command used to create a new project.

InstalledPlugin.description: Represents an installed plugin with its ID and version.

ProjectDetails.description: Represents detailed project information, including saved and loaded files.

ProjectInstance.description: Represents an instance of a project execution.

TriggerAnalysisCommand.description: Command used to trigger a script analysis.
